ab: kagagan ko si Anopan, kanakan iya do pongso.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Anopan，他也是雅美(達悟)族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Anopan, and he is also an Tao child.

ab: nimiheza namen do jiratay a mivatvatek.
ch: 我們一起在漁人部落讀書。
en: We study together in the jiratay tribe.

ab: namen masanib a amizeng so kavavatanen no rarakeh, namen matotopos manci so cireng no tao.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說雅美(達悟)語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Tao proficiently.

ab: ko makarang a matava paa, am si Anopan yamahehep a yamagozang.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Anopan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Anopan is short and thin.

ab: ya mazigton si Anopan, a da ikakza iya.
ch: Anopan很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Anopan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
